parameters.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

REPO_DIR="/tmp/agentskills-build"
GITHUB_REPO="https://github.com/agentnxt/agentskills.git"

# Clone or pull
if [ -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; then
  cd "$REPO_DIR" && git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main
else
  rm -rf "$REPO_DIR"
  git clone --depth 1 "$GITHUB_REPO" "$REPO_DIR"
  cd "$REPO_DIR"
fi

echo "REPO_DIR=$REPO_DIR"
echo "Cloned successfully"

#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /tmp/agentskills-build

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, json, re
from datetime import datetime, timezone

CATEGORY_MAP = {
    "app-alternatives-finder": "analysis",
    "autonomyx-content-formatter": "content",
    "autonomyx-fraud-sentinel": "security",
    "autonomyx-identity-fabric": "dev",
    "autonomyx-langflow-expert": "dev",
    "autonomyx-logo-favicon-creator": "design",
    "autonomyx-music-player": "media",
    "autonomyx-pro-list-to-action": "automation",
    "autonomyx-skill-evaluator": "meta",
    "autonomyx-vocabulary": "meta",
    "blog-cover-pic": "design",
    "brand-kit-generator": "design",
    "content-formatter": "content",
    "coolify-one-click-deploy": "dev",
    "ecommerce-integration-expert": "ecommerce",
    "feature-gap-analyzer": "analysis",
    "list-to-action": "automation",
    "mcp-from-apidocs": "dev",
    "microsoft-integration-expert": "dev",
    "oss-to-saas-analyzer": "analysis",
    "rebrand-value-index": "analysis",
    "saas-cost-analyzer": "saas",
    "saas-evaluator": "saas",
    "saas-policy-intelligence": "saas",
    "saas-standardizer": "saas",
    "saas-total-cost-of-ownership-analyzer": "saas",
    "skill-creator": "meta",
    "skills-frameworks": "meta",
    "unboxd-badges": "credentials",
    "web-crawler": "dev",
    "website-policy-drafting-skill": "legal",
}

skills = []
for d in sorted(os.listdir(".")):
    skill_path = os.path.join(d, "SKILL.md")
    if not os.path.isfile(skill_path):
        continue
    with open(skill_path) as f:
        content = f.read()
    fm_match = re.match(r'^---\s*\n(.*?)\n---', content, re.DOTALL)
    if not fm_match:
        continue
    fm = fm_match.group(1)
    name_match = re.search(r'^name:\s*(.+)', fm, re.MULTILINE)
    name = name_match.group(1).strip().strip('"\"') if name_match else d
    desc = ""
    desc_block = re.search(r'^description:\s*[>|]-?\s*\n((?:\s+.+\n?)+)', fm, re.MULTILINE)
    if desc_block:
        desc = " ".join(desc_block.group(1).strip().split())
    if not desc:
        desc_match = re.search(r'^description:\s*["\'](.+?)["\']', fm, re.MULTILINE)
        if desc_match:
            desc = desc_match.group(1).strip()
    if not desc:
        desc_match = re.search(r'^description:\s*(.+)', fm, re.MULTILINE)
        if desc_match:
            val = desc_match.group(1).strip()
            if val not in (">", "|", ">-", "|-"):
                desc = val
    heading_match = re.search(r'^#\s+(.+)', content[fm_match.end():], re.MULTILINE)
    display_name = heading_match.group(1).strip() if heading_match else name
    category = CATEGORY_MAP.get(d, "general")
    deprecated = "DEPRECATED" in (desc or "").upper()
    has_dist = os.path.isfile(f"dist/{d}.skill")
    refs_dir = os.path.join(d, "references")
    ref_count = len(os.listdir(refs_dir)) if os.path.isdir(refs_dir) else 0
    skills.append({
        "slug": d, "name": name, "displayName": display_name,
        "description": desc[:500] if desc else "",
        "category": category, "deprecated": deprecated,
        "hasDistPackage": has_dist, "referenceCount": ref_count,
        "github": f"https://github.com/agentnxt/agentskills/tree/main/{d}",
        "download": f"https://github.com/agentnxt/agentskills/raw/main/dist/{d}.skill"
    })

manifest = {
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "generated": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    "totalSkills": len(skills),
    "activeSkills": len([s for s in skills if not s["deprecated"]]),
    "categories": sorted(set(CATEGORY_MAP.values())),
    "skills": skills
}
with open("skills-manifest.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(manifest, f, indent=2)
print(f"Manifest: {len(skills)} skills ({manifest['activeSkills']} active)")
PYEOF

#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /tmp/agentskills-build
mkdir -p dist

for dir in */; do
  slug=$(basename "$dir")
  if [ -f "$dir/SKILL.md" ]; then
    rm -f "dist/$slug.skill"
    zip -r "dist/$slug.skill" "$slug/" -x "$slug/.git/*" > /dev/null 2>&1
    echo "Built: $slug.skill"
  fi
done

echo "Total packages: $(ls dist/*.skill 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"

#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /tmp/agentskills-build

git config user.email "automation@agentnxt.com"
git config user.name "AgentNXT Bot"

git add skills-manifest.json dist/

if git diff --cached --quiet; then
  echo "No changes to commit"
else
  git commit -m "Auto-build: update manifest and .skill packages"
  git push origin main
  echo "Pushed updates"
fi

#!/bin/bash
# Trigger GitHub Pages rebuild
cd /tmp/agentskills-build
curl -s -X POST \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" \
  "https://api.github.com/repos/agentnxt/agentskills/pages/builds" || echo "Pages rebuild triggered (or not configured)"
